title: How to charge and collect the tax: GST/HST for digital-economy businesses - Canada.ca
content:
GST/HST for digital-economy businesses

## How to charge and collect the tax
Measures for digital-economy businesses are in effect as of July 1, 2021 .
Once you have registered for the GST/HST, you are required to begin charging and collecting the tax on the taxable supplies that you make in Canada.
You may have different obligations depending on your type of business:
- Cross-border digital products and services
- Supply of qualifying goods in Canada
- Platform-based short-term accommodation

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
